title: Majulah Package – Earn and Save Bonus
text:
Majulah Package – Earn and Save Bonus - SupportGoWhere
Majulah Package – Earn and Save Bonus
Share link
Supplements eligible working seniors' retirement savings through an annual Earn and Save Bonus credited to their CPF account.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible working seniors can receive up to $1,000 annual Earn and Save Bonus in their CPF account
Bonus will be credited in March each year
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

Eligible working seniors can receive $400 to $1,000 annual Earn and Save Bonus in their CPF account, tiered by income

Eligible working seniors with lower income will receive a higher Earn and Save Bonus

Who is this for?

Eligibility criteria

Born in 1973 or earlier

Singapore Citizen residing in Singapore

Employed, self-employed, and/or platform worker

Average monthly income in preceding Year of Assessment of $500 to $6,000

Annual Value of the place of residence (as indicated on NRIC) must not exceed $31,000, as at 30 November of the preceding year

Does not own more than 1 property

How to apply?

Employees and Platform Workers

No application required

Your Earn and Save Bonus eligibility will be automatically assessed




Self-employed persons

Declare your income to IRAS to be assessed for Earn and Save Bonus

Where can I find help?

View more details

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 27 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
